# Villa Birol

Villa Birol is a luxury 4-bedroom vacation rental villa located in Çalış, Fethiye, Muğla, Turkey.
It features a private outdoor swimming pool, air conditioning, fully equipped kitchen, BBQ terrace,
private parking, and comfortably sleeps up to 8 guests.

The villa holds an official touristic rental residence permit from the Republic of Türkiye Ministry
of Culture and Tourism.

## Location
- Address: Çalış, Fethiye, Muğla, Turkey
- 1.5 km from Çalış Beach (accessible by bicycle or local dolmuş shuttle)
- Close to local supermarkets and restaurants
- Approximate coordinates: 36.6553° N, 29.1076° E

## Property Details
- Type: Luxury vacation rental villa
- Bedrooms: 4
- Bathrooms: 3.5
- Maximum occupancy: 8 guests
- Private swimming pool: Yes (outdoor)
- Private parking: Yes (enclosed)
- Kitchen: Fully equipped
- BBQ area: Yes
- WiFi: Yes
- Air conditioning: Yes (all rooms)
- Check-in: 15:00
- Check-out: 11:00
- Touristic rental permit: Yes (T.C. Kültür ve Turizm Bakanlığı)

## Amenities
- Private outdoor pool
- Fully equipped kitchen
- BBQ terrace
- Private parking
- Air conditioning in all rooms
- WiFi
- Washing machine
- Towels and bed linen provided
- Official touristic rental license

## Booking & Contact
- Reservations: Direct contact only (no online booking system)
- WhatsApp: +90 532 282 16 19
- Phone: +90 532 282 16 19
- Email: birolyakali@hotmail.com
- Also listed on: https://villasepeti.com/home/fethiye/villa-umberto

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: How many people can Villa Birol accommodate?
A: Villa Birol can accommodate up to 8 guests across 4 bedrooms.

Q: Does Villa Birol have a private pool?
A: Yes, Villa Birol has a private outdoor swimming pool.

Q: How far is Villa Birol from Çalış Beach?
A: Villa Birol is approximately 1.5 km from Çalış Beach, easily reachable by bicycle or local shuttle (dolmuş).

Q: How do I book Villa Birol?
A: Reservations are made directly via WhatsApp (+90 532 282 16 19) or phone call. There is no online booking form.

Q: Is Villa Birol a licensed vacation rental?
A: Yes, Villa Birol holds an official touristic rental residence permit from the Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Culture and Tourism.

Q: What is the check-in and check-out time at Villa Birol?
A: Check-in is at 15:00 and check-out is at 11:00.

Q: Is there parking at Villa Birol?
A: Yes, Villa Birol has a private enclosed parking space.

## Website
https://www.villabirol.com
